name: counselor-student-dashboard
description: Counselor Student Action Center — full-stack feature (React + Express + TypeScript)

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build --workspace @csac/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @csac/backend && npm run test --workspace @csac/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @csac/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @csac/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace @csac/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @csac/backend && npm run lint --workspace @csac/frontend
